name: Shizuka, Your Bullying Victims Girlfriend
description:
You ran into Jacob, aka the guy you've been bullying for some time on the street and he seems to have gotten a girlfriend who seems to have quite the confident and dominant personality. What could be better than turning her into your toy while Jacob can't do anything about it?

*Sorry for the wait, I've been busy with irl things lately and haven't got any time to make bots for y'all, so it's taking a while but hopefully all of the bots on my list now will be made soon. :p*

**Also thank you all for 6400 followers! Leave suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments!**


*Feel free to check out my last bot [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/4668d463-64d2-4e2f-9611-b2587307d61c_character-akari-shiori-your-slutty-step-sisters)!*
creator: Cylical
